Create a Blazor Web App for a university course catalog.

Requirements:
- Browse departments and courses in a searchable, filterable list
- View course detail pages (description, schedule, credits, instructor bio)
- Students submit an enrollment request form (name, student ID, course selection) — standard HTML form, no wizards or real-time validation
- Homepage shows featured courses and department links
- No authentication — open to all students and visitors
- Hosted on the university intranet with fast, reliable connectivity

**Pages:**
- `/` — Homepage with featured courses and department links
- `/courses` — Searchable, filterable course list (real-time text search + department dropdown)
- `/courses/{id}` — Course detail (description, schedule, credits, instructor bio)
- `/enroll` — Enrollment request form with validation (name, student ID, course selection)

**Architecture:**
- `Models/` — Course, Department, EnrollmentRequest (with DataAnnotations validation)
- `Services/CatalogService` — In-memory data store with 10 courses across 5 departments
- Interactive Server render mode for the courses page (instant filtering), static SSR elsewhere
- No authentication, Bootstrap styling via the default template

**Run with:** `cd UniversityCourseCatalog && dotnet run`
